falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 in 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would contradict the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate extreme market pressure, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the VIX crosses below 15
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained drop in volatility to this level would indicate market complacency, refuting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by showing no imminent risk.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
